race.comment: GLORIOUS MOMENTS (15) deserves his chance at Listed level after producing good figures with a tenacious win over 1400m at Randwick with the 60.5kg. Building a tidy winning CV and will relish the fast tempo on the limit. Expected to measure up. GENERAL SALUTE (1) classy gelding who gets a much better set-up for this third-up. Slashing first-up run, then worked hard early from the wide gate with a tiring ninth over 1400m in the LR Civic Stakes at Randwick. Ran second to Autumn Glow in the spring. Hard to stop. MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (4) going quickly through his grades and had plenty up the sleeve when winning the LR Civic Stakes at Randwick. Tricky map today but hard to ignore in this vein of form. PIPPIE BEACH (13) back in trip and grade after racing without luck over the Queensland carnival. Saves her best for this course and distance and the fast tempo suits. Each way. MCHALE (6) capable gelding who races best early in the prep. Eye-catching return and stays in the calculations.
